name: @luminarylabs/nexusengine-experiments
description: Nexus Engine browser experiments composed from kits.

scripts.generate: npm run generate:application-routes && npm run generate:gallery-data
scripts.check: npm run generate && npm run check:control-math && node scripts/run-checks.mjs && npm run check:sora-stormglass-courier && npm run check:vr-board-breakwater-lighthouse && npm run check:living-agent-canal-brigade && npm run check:next-ledge-ridge-stretcher-relay && npm run check:meadow-skylark-nest-rescue
scripts.check:deploy: npm run generate && npm run check:control-math && node scripts/run-checks.mjs --deploy && npm run check:sora-stormglass-courier && npm run check:vr-board-breakwater-lighthouse && npm run check:living-agent-canal-brigade && npm run check:next-ledge-ridge-stretcher-relay && npm run check:meadow-skylark-nest-rescue
